name: triage filter writes one structured decision record per PR with number, decision, and reason fields
command: printf '{"number":1,"merged":true,"author_type":"User","docs_only":false,"substantive_comments":1,"reviewer_requested_changes":false,"iterative_pushes":0}\n' > p1.json && printf '{"number":2,"merged":true,"author_type":"User","docs_only":false,"substantive_comments":3,"reviewer_requested_changes":true,"iterative_pushes":1}\n' > p2.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/triage.sh" --pr p1.json --pr p2.json --out triage.jsonl 2>err.txt && [ "$(wc -l < triage.jsonl)" -eq 2 ] && grep -q '"number":1' triage.jsonl && grep -q '"number":2' triage.jsonl && grep -q '"decision":"reject"' triage.jsonl && grep -q '"decision":"accept"' triage.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
